text: Cymbalta takes effect quickly -- within days, as opposed to weeks -- and relieves one's sense of hopelessness, futility and fatigue during a deep depression. At higher doses, a sense of purpose and direction to one's life was also restored, allowing the patient (in this case, me) to exercise better judgment and effective follow through on plans and decisions. I haven't noticed any overt side-effects. For me this medication has been extremely effective and very easy to use. Two 60 mg. capsules first thing in the morning.
